dialogos.texto_en: Uesugi-kun, look at this.\nDon't you think this dolphin stuffed animal is cute?
Oh, but still, it's hard to choose\nwhen this whale shark here is also so appealing.
If we're talking about a souvenir\nfrom Churaumi Aquarium, then I think\nthe whale shark is the way to go, right?
There aren't any regular\nshark stuffed animals, huh...
Well, a whale shark is still a shark.\nLet's include it in the group.
This 'chinsuko' biscuit is also shaped like a whale shark.\nAre we able to sample it?
Hey, didn't you just eat a sweet potato tart earlier?
Yes, I did. And it was really delicious, you know?
You're the one who ate it though...
(I was too naive...!)
(I thought I could do it earlier,\n but while we were moving around,\n they all got shuffled about.)
(Even if I get a hint to figure them out,\n it can't be maintained and I have to start over\n from scratch every time the location changes...)
Uesugi-kun?\nWhy do you look so troubled?
...It's nothing. I just wonder if this is how it feels \nto have the stones you worked so hard to pile up \nonly to have someone knock them down on a whim.
What now?\nWere you building something with stones somewhere?
It's a metaphor. Don't worry about it.
Uesugi-kun, why don't you buy something\nas a souvenir for Raiha-chan, too?
Look! There are plenty of cute things here\nthat a girl would love.
(If she's concerned about Raiha,\n maybe it's something to do with Yotsuba or Itsuki?\n No, this cute stuff might be Nino's specialty.)
(Are there any other hints around here...?)
Hey, look over there!\nAll those girls are wearing the same clothes.
...Huh?
Are they sisters?\nThey all look exactly alike.
(Probably talking about the quintuplets.)
(If they approach us again, it'll be a hassle.\n It might be best to give up on souvenir shopping here\n and leave early.)
Is that so? They do look alike,\nbut if you look closely,\nthere are differences, aren't there?
Huh, you can tell them apart?
Wh-what's the big deal?\nIt's easy to tell with a quick glance.
Ohh, really? I don't see it.\nCan you tell me what the difference is?
(No way...)
Well, um... It's difficult to explain,\nor rather... You should be able to see it\nwithout me having to explain it?!
Ahaha!\nYou actually can't do it at all, huh.\nHow embarrassing.
(Haah...\n Geez, seriously.\n Trying to show off and all.)
(If it were that easy,\n I wouldn't have gone through all this trouble...)
Um... Uesugi-kun, can I talk to you for a moment?
Yeah, I already noticed without you saying anything.\nThis doesn't look good.
A crowd of onlookers is gathering quickly.
I mean, I can't tell them apart at all.\nThey might actually be five identical people.
There's no way they're exactly the same.\nTheir body shape should at least be different, right?
Oh, could this be for some kind of shoot?\nGathering people in the same outfit?
Wow, really?!\nMaybe there are hidden TV cameras or something?!
Uwaa, this could get bad.\nItsuki-chan, let me hide behind your back a second.
Ah, okay.\nGo ahead.
Wait, but we're all wearing the same thing right now,\naren't we?!
Uesugi-kun, this is getting really dangerous.\nIt might become even more of a commotion\nthan yesterday...
Yeah, you're right.\nWe need to get out of here before it gets any worse%p-2;――
Hey, don't those girls\nlook a bit like the actress Nakano Ichika?
Ah! They do look alike!\nWait, doesn't Nakano Ichika have sisters?
Wha?\nThey just said Ichika...
Oh no, did we get caught?\nYou guys, we're getting out of here, now!
Yeah, let's hurry!
Ichika, let's go.
Sorry about this.
It's fine, just hurry up, hurry up!
Okay, everyone's gone.
(*sigh*\n Quintuplets are really, such a pain.)
